message:
fix(core): simplify pattern overlap logic and reorder TOON encoder error handling

pattern_overlap.rs: Replace three separate overlap checks (empty pattern,
exact-literal prefix, glob) with a single unified directory-prefix test.
The previous code had an early return for empty patterns and a separate
branch for non-glob exact literals before the glob containment checks.
The new logic uses is_directory_prefix bidirectionally for all pattern
types, which is both simpler and covers the same cases.

toon.rs: Reorder stdin write error handling in run_encoder to check
process exit status before stdin write errors. When the TOON encoder
process exits with a non-zero status, the exit code and stderr are more
informative than a broken-pipe error from the stdin writer thread. The
previous ordering would report "stdin write failed" even when the real
problem was an encoder crash.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
